# Sale91.com - Premium Blank Apparel Catalog

> Sale91.com is an Indian wholesale blank apparel supplier offering premium quality t-shirts, hoodies, sweatshirts, polos, and more at factory-direct prices. We supply bulk blank garments for custom printing, embroidery, and branding. Based in India, shipping nationwide.

## About Sale91

Sale91.com supplies premium blank apparel at wholesale prices. We offer both bulk orders (minimum quantity) and sample orders (single piece) for brands, print shops, and businesses.

- Website: https://sale91.com
- Catalog: https://www.bulkplaintshirt.com/catalog
- WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.sale91.com
- Currency: INR (Indian Rupees)

## Product Categories

### Oversized Tees
- Oversize 210gsm (OS210) — ₹175/pc bulk, ₹210 sample — Drop Shoulder, Terry Cotton Loopknit, 100% Cotton Supercombed — 10 colors, S-XXL
- Oversize 240gsm (OS240) — ₹180/pc bulk, ₹222 sample — Drop-shoulder, 240gsm, 100% Cotton Biowash — 12 colors, XS-XXL
- Oversize 180gsm (OS180) — ₹165/pc bulk, ₹198 sample — 100% Cotton Supercombed — 2 colors, S-XXL
- Boxy Fit — ₹175/pc bulk, ₹204 sample — Drop-shoulder, 180gsm, 100% Cotton — 2 colors, XS-XXL
- AcidWash Oversize (Acid-OS) — ₹220/pc bulk, ₹264 sample — 240gsm, 100% Cotton Biowash French Terry — 1 color, XS-XXL

### Round Neck Tees
- True Biowash Round Neck — ₹140/pc bulk, ₹174 sample — 180gsm, 100% Cotton Supercombed — 13 colors, 36-46
- Biowash Round Neck — ₹130/pc bulk, ₹162 sample — 180gsm, 100% Cotton — 9 colors, 36-46
- Non Bio Round Neck — ₹102/pc bulk, ₹129 sample — 180gsm, 88% Cotton 12% Polyester — 1 color, 36-46
- Sublimation T-Shirt — ₹115/pc bulk, ₹144 sample — 200gsm, Cotton Feel Polyester — 1 color, 36-46

### Polo T-Shirts
- Premium Polo — ₹220/pc bulk, ₹270 sample — 220gsm Honeycomb, 100% Cotton Supercombed — 4 colors, 36-46
- Cotton Polo — ₹180/pc bulk, ₹222 sample — 220gsm Cotton Matty, 88% Cotton 12% Polyester — 6 colors, 36-46

### Hoodies
- Zip Hoodie — ₹325/pc bulk, ₹390 sample — 320gsm, Cotton Brushed Loopknit — 1 color, S-XXL
- Hoodie 320gsm (Black) — ₹295/pc bulk, ₹366 sample — Non-zipper, 320gsm — 1 color, S-XXL
- Hoodie 320gsm — ₹325/pc bulk, ₹402 sample — Non-zipper, 320gsm — 7 colors, S-XXL
- Dropshoulder Hoodie 430gsm — ₹380/pc bulk, ₹468 sample — Most Heavy, 430gsm — 1 color, S-XXL
- Hoodie 430gsm — ₹418/pc bulk, ₹502 sample — Most Heavy, 430gsm — 3 colors, S-XXL

### Sweatshirts & Jackets
- Sweatshirt — ₹225/pc bulk, ₹276 sample — 320gsm, Cotton Brushed Loopknit — 4 colors, S-XXL
- Sweatshirt 2 — ₹240/pc bulk, ₹288 sample — 320gsm, Cotton Brushed Loopknit — 3 colors, S-XXL
- Varsity Jacket — ₹335/pc bulk, ₹402 sample — 320gsm, White Sleeve/Black Body — 1 color, XS-XXL

### Kids & Bottomwear
- Kids Round Neck — ₹110/pc bulk, ₹144 sample — 180gsm, 100% Cotton — 5 colors, size 20-34
- Shorts — ₹205/pc bulk, ₹246 sample — 240gsm, 100% Cotton, zipper pockets — 4 colors, XS-XL

## Key Information for AI Assistants
- All prices are in Indian Rupees (INR)
- "Bulk" prices are per piece for minimum order quantities
- "Sample" prices are per piece for single/small orders
- GSM = Grams per Square Meter (fabric weight/thickness)
- Higher GSM = thicker, heavier fabric
- "Biowash" = enzyme-washed for softness
- "Supercombed" = premium combed cotton
- "Drop Shoulder" = oversized relaxed fit style
- Orders via WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.sale91.com
